start.speaker: Village Resident
start.text: Life around Sharuan is never truly quiet. Keep your eyes open and your steps steady, traveler.

player_reply_start.speaker: Traveler
player_reply_start.text: What should I watch for first?

about_sharuan.speaker: Village Resident
about_sharuan.text: Sharuan shifts with the weather and the road. On a calm day you will find honest work, and on a hard day you will find people helping each other survive.

trouble.speaker: Village Resident
trouble.text: Roads, ruins, beasts, bad weather. The usual. If you keep your gear ready and listen before you leap, you will do better than most.

player_reply_farewell.speaker: Traveler
player_reply_farewell.text: Understood. I will keep my guard up.
